name: vendor.myndhyve.landing-page
description: MyndHyve landing-page executors — 7 nodes (landing.{content.generate, structure.create, variants.generate, theme.apply, tracking.setup, page.validate, page.publish}). Lifted from src/canvas-types/campaign-studio/nodes/pageBuilder/. Two AI-call sites (content.generate, variants.generate) route through ctx.callAI; the original useDesignSystemStore + useIntegrationStore reads are replaced with input-passthrough — the workflow author resolves design tokens + tracking integrations upstream and feeds them into the executor.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Generate Landing Page Content
nodes.description: AI-powered headlines, sections, CTA variants, SEO metadata. Falls back to hardcoded defaults on AI failure.

nodes.label: Create Page Structure
nodes.description: Convert generated content into a CampaignPage with sections + default theme + tracking shell.

nodes.label: Generate Persona Variants
nodes.description: Per-persona content variants for A/B testing. Splits traffic evenly across personas; falls back to identity copy on AI failure.

nodes.label: Apply Theme to Page
nodes.description: Apply a design-system theme to a page + variants. Theme tokens come from inputs.designSystem (workflow resolves upstream); defaults applied when DS is absent.

nodes.label: Set Up Page Tracking
nodes.description: Wire pixel IDs, default events, and UTM links. Pixel IDs come from inputs.trackingIntegrations (caller-supplied; defaults to empty).

nodes.label: Validate Page
nodes.description: Static SEO/accessibility/performance checks. Returns per-issue list + per-axis score + overall isValid. No external calls.

nodes.label: Publish Page
nodes.description: Publish an approved page. Returns the URL + per-variant URLs + CDN asset paths. Refuses when approved=false. CDN paths are conventional; actual CDN-upload is the host's responsibility.
